name: Nijiya Market
tagline: Boutique Japanese grocery with impeccable quality sushi, onigiri, and hard-to-find Japanese ingredients.
parking: Shared lot at Ala Moana area
talkStory: Nijiya is a smaller, more curated Japanese grocery that locals love for its quality over quantity approach. The prepared foods section has restaurant-quality sushi, onigiri, and bento boxes. The produce is pristine and the Japanese snack aisle is a treasure hunt. Less overwhelming than Marukai but the quality is consistently higher. The freshly made onigiri are a perfect quick lunch.
